subcodes.first_line: Thy book hath attained unto the presence of the Wronged One and hath been honored by the hearing of Him Who is imprisoned in the path of God, the Lord of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاز کتابک بمنظر المظلوم و تشرف باستماع من سجن فی سبیل الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
